title: Clock In
description: A mod that provides a daily reward system, economy system, raffle system, etc.
body:
# Clock In
A mod which is NOT just about clocking in.

## Features
**SINCE IT IS DEVELOPING ACTIVELY, SO SOME FEATURES LISTED BELOW MAY __NOT__ BE AVALIABLE AT PRESENT!**
- Set daily reward, cumulate reward, cumulate reward per month, date-specified reward, and more!
- Make-up support.
- Built-in economy system, or intergrated with others.
- Built-in raffle system. Have fun, while keeping an eye on your balance! :)

## Commands
`/clockin dailyclockin` get daily reward
`/clockin mail get [page]` display mails (default page is 1)

### Op-only (Permission level = 4)
set reward item list: `/clockin admin reward set <key> itemList <fromHot-bar|fromInvertory|fromMainHand>`

set reward money/raffle ticket/makeup card: `/clockin admin reward set <key> <money|raffleTicket|makeupCard> <amount>`

_Alias Available_

### Supported `<key>` Format:
- daily_reward
- cumulate_reward_x
- cumulate_reward_monthly_x
- daily_reward_YYYYMMDD (ex. daily_reward_20240812)
